items.briefing:
Good news for Australian organisations: new data shows phishing risk drops significantly after staff complete security awareness training, a direct reminder of why regular training programs matter. However, threats are evolving fast — ESET is warning of a surge in "quishing" (QR code phishing) and AI-powered attacks, and a recent case showed a lone attacker using AI tools to compromise an AWS cloud environment within just 72 hours.

Staff remain the first line of defence. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected QR code by email or in person, don't scan it — verify the source directly before proceeding.

featured.title: Australia & New Zealand phishing risk drops after training
featured.quote: Australian workers' phishing vulnerability dropped to 5.3% after security training, showing measurable progress.
